# Alan Gabriel Ascorti — Portfolio

> https://lemonsix.github.io/

## Summary

Software Architect · Domain-driven backends · Multitenant SaaS on Azure | Go

Software architect specialized in translating complex business domains — finance, compliance, healthcare, logistics, and operations — into scalable, maintainable multitenant systems.

Lead Developer at Contarg: broker-dealer SaaS with treasury/fiscal workflows, capital markets, healthcare, logistics, and omnichannel operations. Go microservices use hexagonal architecture on Azure; Alycs is a monolithic Go backend with separate Next.js frontend. Row-level multitenancy, event sourcing (subset), outbox for Meta APIs, Jaeger observability.

## Sections on site

- EXPERIENCE: work history with business-first, impact-focused bullets
- SKILLS: technical, domain expertise, languages, certifications
- PERSONAL PROJECTS: Six Labs, Clino, Candra
- ACTIVITY: GitHub contribution graph
